summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) student success & program professional who thrives on guiding people toward their goals, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can support people's growth—through human-centered, relationship-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Advise and support 600+ students and program participants through live workshops and webinars, guiding decision-making and connecting goals to next steps
Conduct needs assessments with 25+ global {cross|stakeholders} to identify learning gaps and design 3 new educational programs for diverse learners
Develop guides, sample plans, and workflows for 70+ {cross|cross-functional} staff, improving program understanding and reducing onboarding time by 75%
Manage 20+ {prog|programs} and 10+ partners, maintaining accurate records and resources and refining delivery via {data|feedback analysis}
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement and development strategies
Analyzed 2,000+ {data|individual experiences} to amplify people's voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction and retention drivers
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|people experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, recognition, and learning & development
Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 other global locations
Supported individuals across cultures through onboarding and relocation, building rapport and clarifying processes in a multicultural setting
Optimized onboarding across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying roles and responsibilities
Strengthened engagement via a newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Conduct discovery interviews and focus groups with leadership to diagnose challenges and identify {data|evidence-based} improvements
Translate qualitative and quantitative findings into executive-ready insights that lead to redesigned policies and practices
Developed proficiency across functions ranging from recruitment and communication to records and process management
Engaged global candidates via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with leaders at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Drafted clear materials and postings, researching details to give people accurate, timely information for decisions
